_comment: Provenance for the committed Photo Booth reference images in this folder. Filled in during the one-time Mac capture (see ../MAC-CAPTURE.md). The refs/*.png beside this file are what compare.mjs scores our shaders against.
notes: Slider values below are the Photo Booth distortion-slider position used per effect (0..1, matched into render via window.__intensities). Color/stylize effects have no slider.
